name: photo-map
description: Scan a folder of photos, extract GPS coordinates, and view them on a map

_comments.electron: The framework that lets us build a desktop app using web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript). It bundles a browser (Chromium) and a Node.js runtime together.
_comments.electron-store: A simple way to save user settings (like the API key and folder path) to a file on disk, so they persist between app restarts. PINNED at ^8.x — electron-store 9+ is ESM-only and incompatible with this CommonJS app.
_comments.exifr: Reads the hidden metadata embedded in photo files (EXIF data), which includes GPS coordinates, date taken, camera model, etc.
_comments.heic-convert: Decodes HEIC/HEIF image files into raw pixel data using pure JavaScript — no native binaries required. Used to generate thumbnails for HEIC photos when the file has no embedded JPEG preview.
_comments.sharp: A fast image processing library. Resizes decoded image data into JPEG thumbnails the browser can display.
_comments.leaflet: An open-source JavaScript library for interactive maps. Provides the map container, tile layers, markers, and layer-switcher control. Loaded as a static script from node_modules — no build step needed. The MapTiler API key is only used for the tile URLs, not for Leaflet itself.
_comments.chokidar: Watches a folder on disk for changes (new files added, files deleted) and notifies our app in real time. PINNED at ^3.x — chokidar 4+ is ESM-only and incompatible with this CommonJS app.
_comments.electron-builder: Packages the finished app into a .dmg installer for Mac, .exe for Windows, or .AppImage/.deb for Linux.
_comments.@electron/rebuild: Recompiles native Node.js modules (like sharp) so they work inside Electron's bundled runtime rather than the system Node.js. Run automatically before every build command on all platforms (Windows, Mac, Linux). Exposes the same 'electron-rebuild' binary as the old electron-rebuild package, so npm scripts are unchanged.
_comments.npm-run-all: Runs npm scripts in sequence. Used by the build scripts so that electron-rebuild always completes before electron-builder starts, on all platforms including Windows where the shell && operator is not always reliable.
_comments.eslint: Static analysis tool that catches code errors and style issues. PINNED at ^8.x — ESLint 9+ uses a flat-config format that requires rewriting .eslintrc.json.
